metadata.description: Observes an existing artifact's structural and stylistic fingerprint and generates new artifacts that match the observed shape, vocabulary, and naming idiom.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. One install pulls in all six Naga sub-plugins via dependency resolution.

plugins.name: naga-observe
plugins.description: Extracts the pattern fingerprint from a source artifact via N1 AST + N2 TF-IDF. Persists to state/patterns/<hash>.json. No generation.

plugins.name: naga-shift
plugins.description: Generates a target artifact matching the source-pattern fingerprint via N1+N2+N3+N4 with N5 per-class threshold gating.

plugins.name: naga-validate
plugins.description: Scores fidelity of a generated output against a source pattern via N1 + N4 with bootstrap 95% CI and sample count N.

plugins.name: naga-cross-repo
plugins.description: Cross-repo pattern replication with sibling-repo path resolution. Wraps /naga:match for remote source and target trees.

plugins.name: naga-fingerprint
plugins.description: Read-only pattern report. No generation, no state mutation outside reports.

plugins.name: naga-learning
plugins.description: PreCompact hook persists per-(pattern-class x target-domain) fidelity posterior via N5 Gauss Accumulation. The single hook in the plugin.
